title: Agentic AI Architecture
summary: Detailed technical proof for Joz's Agentic AI architecture capability.
claims: Joz designs agentic systems with reasoning, orchestration, retrieval, memory, verification, and feedback loops.
He understands production concerns including asynchronous workflows, APIs, access control, observability, and governance.
His AI work is framed around business problems and operational outcomes.
proof_points: MarketClue financial AI agents with live data and asset portfolio context.
Enterprise RAG and context-engineering architecture reflected in his current applied AI skill set.
AI governance, retrieval controls, and verification are explicit parts of his architecture approach.
